Droidify does not host or redistribute any files.
Every download link goes directly to the original project's own servers.

If you just want your project removed, use the Takedown Request template instead.
It is faster and simpler and does not require any of the fields below.

If you genuinely believe a file is being hosted here, fill this in
and we will respond within 48 hours.
-->
